# Celestial Pilgrimage
## Scripture
"For here we do not have an enduring city, but we are looking for the city that is to come." - Hebrews 13:14

## Reflection
As we gaze up at the night sky, we're reminded of the celestial bodies that embark on their own journeys, traversing the vast expanse of space. The planets, stars, and galaxies are all on a pilgrimage, moving towards their destined paths. Similarly, as Christians, we are on a spiritual pilgrimage, navigating the twists and turns of life as we journey towards our eternal home. The phases of the moon, the rhythms of the seasons, and the dance of the constellations all whisper to us of a greater purpose, a grand narrative that unfolds beyond the reaches of our earthly existence.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, as we ponder the celestial pilgrimage of the stars and planets, remind us that our own journey is not without purpose. Guide us as we navigate the uncertainties of life, and may our hearts be fixed on the city that is to come. Help us to see the beauty in the journey, to trust in Your sovereignty, and to press on towards the eternal home You have prepared for us. May the light of the stars illuminate our path, and may the promise of Your presence accompany us every step of the way. In Jesus' name, we pray. Amen.
